title: frangula alnus var. angustifolia
intro: Frangula alnus var. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved buckthorn, is a variety of the Frangula alnus plant, which is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. The medicinal properties of Frangula alnus var. angustifolia lie in its ability to act as a laxative, due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and help to relieve constipation. The health benefits of using Frangula alnus var. angustifolia include its ability to promote digestive health, relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and support the immune system. Frangula alnus var. angustifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
